==
* <<a_api subproject="server" text="Index of types" | index types >>
* <<a_api subproject="server" text="Index of exceptions" | index exceptions >>
* <<a_api subproject="server" text="Index of values" | index values >>
* <<a_api subproject="server" text="Index of modules" | index modules >>
* <<a_api subproject="server" text="Index of module types" | index module types >>
\
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Comet >>|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This module provides function to monitor communications between the server
    clients~.
>>
|
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Connect_phone >>||
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Core_db >>|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This module defines low level functions for database requests~.
>>
|
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Current_user >>|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This module provides functions and types to manage the current user~.
>>
|
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Date >>|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Time zone and date management for ~Web applications~.
>>
|
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Db >>|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This module defines low level functions for database requests~.
>>
|
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Email >>|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Basic module for sending e~-mail messages to users~,
    using some local sendmail program~.
>>
|
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Fcm_notif >>|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Send push notifications to ~Android and i~O~S mobile devices~.
>>
|
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Group >>|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Groups of users~.
>>
|
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Handlers >>|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This module contains pre~-defined handlers for connect~, disconnect~, sign up~,
    add a new email~, etc~.
>>
|
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Icons >>|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~The icons used internally by ~Ocsigen ~Start~'s library~.
>>
|
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Lib >>|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This module aims to provide common utilities functions~.
>>
|
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Msg >>|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This module provides functions to display messages ~(client~-side or
    server~-side~)~.
>>
|
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Notif >>|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Server to client notifications~.
>>
|
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Page >>|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Functor defining wrappers for services handlers returning pages~.
>>
|
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Platform >>|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~About device platform~.
>>
|
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Request_cache >>|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Caching request data to avoid doing the same computation several times
    during the same request~.
>>
|
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Services >>|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This module provides pre~-defined services for connect~, disconnect~, sign up~,
    add a new email~, etc~.
>>
|
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Session >>|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Connection and disconnection of users~,
    restrict access to services or server functions~,
    define actions to be executed at some points of the session~.
>>
|
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Tips >>|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Tips for new users and new features~.
>>
|
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Types >>|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Data types
>>
|
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module Uploader >>|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This module defines functions to manipulate images to be uploaded~.
>>
|
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module User >>|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This module provides functions and types about users~.
>>
|
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module User_proxy >>|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This module implements a cache of user using ~<~<a~_api project~="eliom" ~|
    module ~Eliom~.~Cscache~>~> which allows to keep synchronized the cache between
    the client and the server~.
>>
|
|<<a_api subproject="server" | module User_view >>|<<div class="odocwiki_info"|~This module defines functions to create password forms~, connection forms~,
    settings buttons and other common contents arising in applications~.
>>
|
